_comment: Effect definitions for Realm of Shadow. Each effect can be slotted into one of the party's 4 effect slots. Duration is a step count or 'permanent'. Requirements use ALL-match logic: every listed field must be satisfied. For class/race, the party must have a member of that class/race. For max_level, the party's highest level must be at or below that value.

effects.name: Night Vision
effects.description: The party can see in darkness without a torch.

effects.name: Detect Traps
effects.description: Traps are revealed before the party steps on them.

effects.name: Swift Travel
effects.description: The party moves faster on the overworld.

effects.name: Iron Skin
effects.description: All party members gain bonus armor class in combat.

effects.name: Keen Eyes
effects.description: Hidden items and secret passages are revealed.

effects.name: Blessed Aura
effects.description: Party members slowly regenerate HP while exploring.

effects.name: Arcane Sight
effects.description: Magical items glow, revealing their properties.

effects.name: Stone Resolve
effects.description: Dwarven fortitude protects the party from poison.

effects.name: Battle Cry
effects.description: The first attack each combat deals bonus damage.

effects.name: Infravision
effects.description: Dwarven eyes pierce the darkness, revealing the world in shades of red.
